title: DataSourceTable
description: A data source table, which allows the user to import a static table of data from the DataSource into Sheets.

dataSourceId.description: The ID of the data source the data source table is associated with.

columnSelectionType.description: The type to select columns for the data source table.

columns.description: Columns selected for the data source table.

filterSpecs.description: Filter specifications in the data source table.

sortSpecs.description: Sort specifications in the data source table.

rowLimit.description: The limit of rows to return.
